title: LegacyAI Patch Record
description: Metadata record for a patch/diff file stored in the Legacy64 archive.

id.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the patch file contents.

file.description: Relative path to the patch file within the archive root.

hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest (same as id, stored for explicitness).

added_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the patch was imported.
